items.value: Why is this taking so long...
The player should've been there alre-
-Uh?
Oooh, hi there!
I wasn't expecting you here! What a surpriiise!
Feel free to look around to see what I've been working on!
Just, please, don't touch anything!
And don't worry about me.
I'll be doing...
Mmmmmm-ath teacher stuff.
Hey! Don't dare to touch that! I'm warning you.
You didn't thought I was that fast, did you?
I'm sure that we both know
that you're not supposed to be here.
I see now that you're no different from them.
Always looking for new secrets,
trespassing what they shouldn't,
and pulling unknown levers!
It's clear that you're also looking for a way
to understand this very special thing, that...
If I remember what he used to call it...
Oh, that's right!
The lore.
If you think there's more to this,
what you people may call a secret ending,
well, let me tell you something...
There's nothing else.
So, I don't want you messing with my lab
or this incredible creation behind me.
Anyways, I think you've heard enough of me.
Oh, didn't I tell you?
You're not leaving with all I just said.
So, say bye-bye to your small triiip!
See ya soon!
